news.t: Franklin Templeton Launches Franklin Exponential Data ETF (XDAT) to Harness Data Transformation

holdings.infoBox: XDAT is an equity ETF with a total of 63 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 10.15%, Cloudflare at 9.51%, Meta Platforms at 6.82%, AppLovin at 5.00%, and Snowflake at 4.69%.

overview.description: The Franklin Exponential Data ETF (XDAT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is actively-managed to invest in global companies believed to benefit from or facilitate Big Data and its applications such as AI, augmented and virtual reality, software-as-a-service, and personalized advertising and healthcare. XDAT was launched on Jan 12, 2021 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.

data.title: Franklin Templeton Launches Franklin Exponential Data ETF (XDAT) to Harness Data Transformation
data.text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Templeton Launches Franklin Exponential Data ETF (XDAT) to Harness Data Transformation
